title: viola inodora
intro: Viola inodora, also known as Viola odorata, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the viola genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties and is primarily used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach cramps. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and acting as an antispasmodic, making it useful for relieving menstrual cramps and other spasmodic conditions. Viola inodora can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water, or by using it in tincture or capsule form.
